15+ features from BluePrint to Blue

Features Added (from BluePrint):
1. Profile Page - Personal info, avatar upload, password change, preferences
2. Mobile Bottom Navigation - 5 quick nav items + sheet with 15 more
3. Help Page - FAQ, categories, keyboard shortcuts reference
4. PDF Generation - Invoice, Contract, Proposal, Site Report PDFs (jsPDF)
5. Excel Export - Projects, Tasks, Invoices, Clients, Contracts (ExcelJS)
6. AI Document Analysis - Upload documents for AI analysis (z-ai-web-sdk)
7. AI Image Analysis - Analyze construction site photos (z-ai-web-sdk)
8. Backup/Restore - SQLite backup creation and restoration
9. Automations - Workflow automation rules with templates
10. Gantt Chart - Full interactive timeline with milestones
11. BOQ (Bill of Quantities) - 6 categories, CRUD, subtotals
12. Municipality Correspondence - UAE municipality tracking

<p dir="auto">نظام متكامل لإدارة مكاتب الاستشارات الهندسية في الإمارات العربية المتحدة. يدعم اللغة العربية (RTL) والإنجليزية مع 9 أدوار مستخدمين و 39 صفحة تغطي كل المجالات.</p>
<p dir="auto">A comprehensive management system for engineering consultancy offices in the UAE. Supports Arabic (RTL) and English with 9 user roles and 39 pages covering all business domains.</p>
<hr>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2. Install dependencies</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> or: bun install</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3. Set up environment variables</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 4. Initialize database</span>
npx prisma db push
npx prisma db seed

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 5. Start development server</span>
npm run dev
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> or: bun run dev</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 6. Open http://localhost:3000</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<li><strong>المدير العام</strong> (Admin) - Full access</li>

<li><strong>مشاهد</strong> (Viewer) - Read-only access</li>
</ol>
